description: Recto: Philosophical/linguistic discussion (lafẓ, maʿnā, majāz...), in a hand which resembles but is not identical with that of Maimonides. Verso: Related discussion, in both Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic, it seems in the hand of a different scribe.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
